commands.review_summary:
The PR adds inline declaration comments to embedded-agent-runner helper functions covering auth-profile health, trigger prompt policy, fallback overrides, transcript policy, abort cleanup, run-decision, context/cache, payload, and Codex app-server retry contracts.

PR surface: Source +174. Total +174 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR documents existing helper contracts and does not report or change a runtime bug. The relevant check is source/test consistency, which matches the inspected helper behavior and adjacent tests.

target.title: docs: document auth profile failure policy contract
target.body:
## Summary

- Continue the inline-comment pass after PR #88554 on current `main`.
- Document the auth-profile failure policy boundary that decides which failover reasons affect shared provider health.
- Document heartbeat-only trigger policy prompt injection and the default non-heartbeat prompt shape.
- Document embedded model fallback override precedence, including explicit empty override behavior.
- Document RuntimePlan-first transcript policy resolution and legacy provider-runtime fallback adaptation.
- Document embedded abort-settle cleanup timeout resolution and strict decimal env override behavior.
- Document embedded attempt run decisions for write-lock timing, forwarded auth-profile provenance, unknown-tool guarding, hook gating, and tool-policy provider fallback.
- Document the narrow replay-safe Codex app-server recovery retry gate for client-close and completion-idle failures.
- Keep the change comment-only: no file header and no import-block comment.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: comment-only follow-up for auth-profile failover health policy, heartbeat trigger prompt policy, embedded model fallback override policy, attempt transcript policy selection, abort-settle timeout resolution, embedded run-decision contracts, and Codex app-server recovery retry policy; no runtime behavior intended.
Real environment tested: local source checkout.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: git diff --check; git diff --check origin/main..HEAD; pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/auth-profile-failure-policy.test.ts; pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/trigger-policy.test.ts; pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/fallbacks.test.ts; pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.transcript-policy.test.ts; pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-settle-timeout.test.ts; pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.run-decisions.test.ts; pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.codex-app-server-recovery.test.ts.
Evidence after fix: whitespace checks passed; focused Vitest shards passed with 6 auth-profile failure-policy tests, 7 trigger-policy tests, 3 fallback tests, 3 transcript-policy tests, 5 abort-settle-timeout tests, 9 run-decision tests, and 10 Codex app-server recovery tests.
Observed result after fix: PR branch pushed from current main after confirming PR #88554 is merged into main.
What was not tested: broader agent/gateway suites, because this PR only adds declaration documentation for tested helpers.
